title: stachys viscosa
intro: Stachys viscosa, also known as sticky hedge or sticky betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat bacterial infections. The plant is rich in essential oils, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Stachys viscosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
